{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|seo}}
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|infobox}}

{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|description}}
<% if (it.propertiesSection) { -%>

== Properties and Stats ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|properties}}
<% } -%>

== Acquisition ==
<% if (it.acquisition) { -%>
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|acquisition}}
<% } -%>
<% if (it.changelog) { %>
== Changelog ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|changelog}}
<% } -%>

{{Related Pages}}

{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|categories}}
